project.component: { "keyToString": { "Attach to Unity Editor.Attach to Unity Editor.executor": "Debug", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.readMode.enableVisualFormatting": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "codeWithMe.voiceChat.enabledByDefault": "false", "git-widget-placeholder": "master", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "preferences.sourceCode.C#", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }

component.name: RunManager
component.selected: Attach to Unity Editor.Attach to Unity Editor
